name: Sausage, Pepper, & Bread Kabobs
recipeInstructions: Cut each sausage into 2-inch pieces, each prepared bell pepper into 8 pieces, and the bread into 24, 2-inch cubes. To make the marinade: combine all ingredients and heat for 5 minutes over medium heat. Alternately thread the skewers with sausage, bell pepper, and bread, then brush each one with marinade. Marinate for 30 minutes (while the grill heats). Grill over low heat coals, turning often, until the sausage is done, about 20 minutes.
